name: chunknet
description: Chunknet is a wallet-based P2P cloud storage desktop app with encrypted chunks, peer discovery, and manifest sync.
author: Diya Ashour

scripts.dev: node scripts/fix-native-p2p-jsx.cjs && node scripts/patch-download-memory.cjs && node scripts/patch-drive-download-ui.cjs && node scripts/patch-native-upload-streaming.cjs && node scripts/patch-upload-ram-final.cjs && node scripts/patch-native-upload-ui.cjs && node scripts/verify-runtime-safety.cjs && vite --host 127.0.0.1 --port 3000
scripts.prestart:electron: node scripts/fix-native-p2p-jsx.cjs && node scripts/patch-download-memory.cjs && node scripts/patch-drive-download-ui.cjs && node scripts/patch-native-upload-streaming.cjs && node scripts/patch-upload-ram-final.cjs && node scripts/patch-native-upload-ui.cjs && node scripts/verify-runtime-safety.cjs && node scripts/repair-encrypted-manifests.js && node scripts/remove-bad-encrypted-manifests.js
scripts.build: node scripts/fix-native-p2p-jsx.cjs && node scripts/patch-download-memory.cjs && node scripts/patch-drive-download-ui.cjs && node scripts/patch-native-upload-streaming.cjs && node scripts/patch-upload-ram-final.cjs && node scripts/patch-native-upload-ui.cjs && node scripts/verify-runtime-safety.cjs && vite build
scripts.check: node scripts/fix-native-p2p-jsx.cjs && node scripts/patch-download-memory.cjs && node scripts/patch-drive-download-ui.cjs && node scripts/patch-native-upload-streaming.cjs && node scripts/patch-upload-ram-final.cjs && node scripts/patch-native-upload-ui.cjs && node scripts/verify-runtime-safety.cjs && tsc --noEmit
